title: Venezuelan Bowl with Charred Cheese
description: A twist on a classic bowl, this recipe combines the smokiness of charred cheese with the creaminess of a traditional Venezuelan bowl.

ingredients.name: charred cheese
ingredients.notes: Grilled over medium heat until slightly charred

instructions: Cook the rice according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the creamy sauce over low heat.
Add the black beans, diced tomatoes, and shredded lettuce to the pan with the creamy sauce.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Slice the charred cheese into thick pieces.
Assemble the bowls by placing a scoop of cooked rice in the bottom, followed by the bean and tomato mixture, and topped with a slice of charred cheese.
Serve immediately and garnish with sliced avocado.
